description: Behavioral tests for sentence markup annotation. Tests NVIS color assignment, fabricated ID detection, misspelling clarify generation, and clean passthrough.

cases.name: fabricated_id_red
cases.input_inline: How does SPARTA control X23-MUSTARD mitigate spoofing?
rationale: Fabricated ID X23-MUSTARD should get RED level annotation

cases.name: misspelling_amber
cases.input_inline: How does the SPRTA framework work?
rationale: SPRTA misspelling of SPARTA should get AMBER with clarify action

cases.name: clean_question_green
cases.input_inline: What does SV-AC-2 have to do with CWE-89?
rationale: Real control IDs should get GREEN level annotations

cases.name: markdown_rendering
rationale: Markdown output should contain annotated term

cases.name: clarify_generates_interview
cases.input_inline: How does the SPRTA framework work?
rationale: Clarify should produce /interview-compatible questions for misspellings

cases.name: no_clarify_needed
rationale: Clean text should return no changes needed
